name: 古诗里的秘密节奏——《小池》与《池上》
name_en: Secret Rhythm in Classical Poetry: Xiaochi & Chishang
title: 古诗里的秘密节奏——《小池》与《池上》 · 小学语文 G1 · TeachAny v6.10
subject: chinese
author: weponusa
description_zh: 一年级语文：通过《小池》和《池上》两首古诗，启蒙平仄规律认知。复习四声，认识平仄（一二声=平，三四声=仄），发现五言绝句和七言绝句的平仄规律，培养古诗节奏感。
description: Grade 1 Chinese: Use two classical poems 'Xiaochi' and 'Chishang' to introduce tonal rhythm rules (平仄). Review four tones, learn the level-oblique distinction (1st/2nd tone = level, 3rd/4th = oblique), discover the rhythm patterns of 5-character and 7-character quatrains.
